programs.title: Caribbean Life 19
programs.desc: The fate of families who decided to move to the Caribbean.They need to find a suitable home.In each episode, the characters will visit several properties to fulfill their dream of living in paradise.

programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc:
Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places
In this episode, Marcin Prokop sets off on a journey to Silicon Valley.But first, he will visit Sausalito, a city called the Venice of America.In this unique place, houses are built on the water, and residents are separated from the bustling San Francisco by a trip over the Golden Gate Bridge.However, in the heart of Silicon Valley there is Stanford University.This prestigious university counts among its graduates, among others, Elon Musk.This is where Han will tell the host about how to create your own company in the center of American technological thought.Marcin Prokop will also meet Jakub Pachocki.This will be a great opportunity to ask one of the creators of ChatGPT a few questions generated by this tool.

programs.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programs.desc:
Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places
Opened in 1894, Huntsville Prison is an institution where over 580 people lost their lives.Executions of convicts were carried out using an electric chair, which can now be seen as a museum exhibit.David Stacks, a former prison guard, will talk about working there and the emotions that accompany meetings with the most dangerous criminals in America.Jimi Willet, former prison warden and execution supervisor, will reveal whether he ever managed to get used to death.Marcin will also ask him about the impact his job has on his family life.

programs.title: COOL tourists
programs.desc: Rapper Vienio and chef Filip Głodek will go on a trip around European cities.They will not follow popular tourist trails, but will trample their own paths.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world.
